title: Emanuele-Chiummo/llm-wiki-synapse
summary: Self-hosted AI wiki that organizes itself — LLM ingest, knowledge graph, cited chat, Obsidian-compatible vault. FastAPI + React + Tauri.

title: shayeeboy/Enterprise-RAG-Assistant
summary: Local/free RAG assistant over a piano-learning KB: ingestion (chunk -> local embeddings -> Neon pgvector) + query pipeline (rewrite -> hybrid search/RRF -> rerank -> local LLM via Ollama) with citations, guardrails, and observability (tracing, latency, tokens, cost). Node.js, no paid APIs; lessons-learned log.

title: ashlrai/ashlr-hub
summary: Local-first command center for agentic engineers — the CLI + Raycast hub and front door to the Ashlr dev-tool ecosystem.

title: ahwurm/localharness
summary: An open-source, model-agnostic agent harness for local LLMs. Define agents in YAML (tools, memory, deny-first permissions) and run them against any OpenAI-compatible endpoint: vLLM, Ollama, LM Studio, or llama.cpp.

title: Magesh-sam/ollama-ui-wrapper
summary: A simple Ollama UI Wrapper

title: Shivay00001/goatcode
summary: GOATCODE - Production-grade deterministic coding agent with system architecture design, security auditing, and automated CI/CD.

title: AliceBlueCode/DEF
summary: Persistent Character Platform, A platform for walking alongside characters over time.

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: hirokawaguchi/open-genai

title: svasenkov/greedy-token
summary: Route dev tasks through tool → python → ollama → RAG before escalating to Cursor

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: The personal AI that learns you, not the world — local-first, cited recall that forgets when you correct it.

title: h1ddenpr0cess20/wordmark
summary: Client-side AI chat for OpenAI & xAI Responses APIs and local LM Studio/Ollama — tool calling, MCP, TTS, and fully local storage, no backend required.

title: waleedmandour/CorpusMind
summary: Local-first, AI-native research environment for corpus linguistics and multimodal discourse analysis. Engine (FastAPI), web (PWA), desktop (Tauri 2), full 12 statistics with tests, AGPL-3.0.

title: briandenicola/Aurearia
summary: Self-hosted app for cataloging, organizing, and sharing your coin collection

title: natorus87/ninko
summary: Modular, AI-powered IT Operations Platform

title: janderswag/docuchat.app
summary: Private, self-hosted document chat for attorneys: parse legal PDFs and query them with local open-source LLMs (Ollama) + verifiable page citations. One-click desktop app at docuchat.app.

title: MESSIDABOSS96/youtube-deep-search
summary: Content-aware YouTube search: describe what you want, and it ranks videos by what's actually said in the transcript, not the title. Local CLI, bring-your-own-key, open source.
